args : args[0]); }; add(handler); return function () { return remove(handler); }; }); } function toCommonHandlerRegistry(target, eventName) { return function (methodName) { return function (handler) { return target[methodName](eventName, handler); }; }; } function isNodeStyleEventEmitter(target) { return isFunction(target.addListener) && isFunction(target.removeListener); } function isJQueryStyleEventEmitter(target) { return isFunction(target.on) && isFunction(target.off); } function isEventTarget(target) { return isFunction(target.addEventListener) && isFunction(target.removeEventListener); } //# sourceMappingURL=fromEvent.js.map
